name: The Crypt of the Fallen
description: A crumbling crypt beneath the ruins of an old chapel. The air is thick with dust and the smell of decay.

rooms.name: Entrance Chamber
rooms.narrative: You descend worn stone steps into a dim chamber. Cobwebs hang from the ceiling and rats scatter at your approach. A faded mural on the north wall depicts a knight's burial procession.

rooms.name: Guard Room
rooms.narrative: This room was once a guard post. Rusted weapon racks line the walls. Something moves in the shadows...

rooms.name: Rat Warren
rooms.narrative: The floor is covered in gnawed bones and droppings. Giant rats nest in the corners.

rooms.name: Chapel Remains
rooms.narrative: Broken pews and a toppled altar fill this chamber. Faded holy symbols still adorn the walls. Among the rubble, something glints.

rooms.name: Ossuary Landing
rooms.narrative: The stairs open into a hall of bones. Skulls are stacked neatly in alcoves along the walls, their empty eye sockets watching your every move.

rooms.name: Burial Hall
rooms.narrative: Stone sarcophagi line both walls. As you enter, the lids begin to shift and skeletal hands emerge...

rooms.name: Collapsed Passage
rooms.narrative: The ceiling here is cracked and unstable. Loose stones litter the floor. [color=red]Trap: Falling rubble! DEX save DC 12 or take 1d6 bludgeoning.[/color]

rooms.name: Armory
rooms.narrative: An ancient armory, mostly looted. But a few pieces remain in surprisingly good condition.

rooms.name: Dark Shrine
rooms.narrative: A dark altar dominates this chamber. Unholy runes pulse with faint violet light. An orc warrior kneels before it, and rises to face you with a snarl.

rooms.name: Antechamber
rooms.narrative: The air grows colder. Frost clings to the stone walls. You can hear a deep, rhythmic breathing echoing from somewhere ahead.

rooms.name: Guardian Hall
rooms.narrative: Two massive stone statues flank a wide corridor. As you pass between them, the 'statues' lurch to life — zombies encased in crumbling stone armor!

rooms.name: Treasury
rooms.narrative: A hidden treasury! Gold coins spill from rotting chests. Among the treasure, a gleaming suit of armor catches your eye.

rooms.name: Boss Chamber — The Ogre's Lair
rooms.narrative:
[color=red][b]BOSS ENCOUNTER[/b][/color]

A massive ogre sits on a throne of bones, gnawing on what appears to be a femur. It spots you and roars, shaking dust from the ceiling. Behind it, you see a glowing portal — your way out of this crypt.

[color=yellow]Defeat the Ogre to escape the Crypt of the Fallen![/color]

choices.text: Try to sneak past to the portal.
Offer the ogre food as tribute.

on_clear.narrative: [color=green]The ogre falls with an earth-shaking thud! The portal behind the throne flares to life. You've conquered the Crypt of the Fallen![/color]
